summary: Design and structure paid advertising campaigns across search and social platforms with budget allocation and optimization plan.

inputs.name: campaign_objective
inputs.description: Primary conversion goal and target CPA or ROAS.

inputs.name: platform_selection
inputs.description: Advertising platforms to activate (Google, Meta, LinkedIn, etc.).

outputs.name: campaign_structure
outputs.description: Campaign, ad group, and keyword/audience structure per platform.

outputs.name: creative_brief
outputs.description: Ad copy, creative requirements, and landing page alignment.

outputs.name: optimization_plan
outputs.description: Bid strategy, testing plan, and optimization schedule.

budget.notes: Focus on structured campaign design with clear budget logic.

gates.rule: Confirm the request is paid advertising rather than organic or content marketing.
Require campaign objective, platforms, and budget before structuring.
Deliver campaign structure with creative brief and optimization plan.

steps.action: Define platform-specific approach with budget allocation rationale.
Structure search campaigns with keyword themes and bid strategy.
Plan ad creative, copy variations, and landing page alignment.
Define testing plan, bid adjustments, and optimization schedule.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read existing campaign data and competitive intelligence.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Produce campaign structure and creative brief.

verification.method: Check campaign structure follows platform best practices.
Check budget allocation has clear rationale.
Check conversion tracking and attribution are planned.

success_criteria: Campaign structure is logical and platform-appropriate.
Budget allocation is justified by expected performance.
Optimization plan includes testing and iteration schedule.

rollback.when: If budget allocation lacks justification, revert to platform strategy.
